surface.host.main.title: Access & parking
surface.host.main.subtitle: Entry method, optional layers, and when codes are revealed
host.section.primary.help: Pick the primary access method for the property. It is required; layers below are optional.
host.section.methodDetails.help: Fields for the type selected above.
host.section.arrival.help: Address, route steps, and a global note — never put secret codes here.
host.section.reveal.help: Applies to primary method codes, building digicode, and parking code.
host.method.keybox.desc: A code opens a box somewhere on the property.
host.method.door_code.desc: A code on a gate, building, or the door.
host.method.smart_lock.desc: Nuki, Igloohome, Yale… or a manual backup code.
host.method.in_person.desc: You or someone you trust hands over the keys on site.
host.method.host_greets.desc: You are present at arrival to open yourself.
host.method.other.desc: A special case — describe it freely.
host.keybox.location.hint: Describe precisely where the box is so the guest can find it without hesitation.
host.keybox.code.hint: Subject to the reveal policy below.
host.doorCode.target.hint: Chooses the label shown to the guest.
host.doorCode.code.hint: Subject to the reveal policy below.
host.smartLock.manualCode.hint: Shown if the smart lock is offline.
host.smartLock.provider.help: If a module with the access.smart_lock capability is installed, enter its id. Otherwise use the manual code.
host.smartLock.provider.notice.manual: No smart lock module installed yet. The guest will see the manual backup code below.
host.smartLock.provider.notice.linked: The link will be active once the provider module is installed on this property.
host.inPerson.meetingPlace.hint: A clear landmark (e.g. “in front of the blue gate”).
host.address.label: Address
host.address.hint: Full address as shown to the guest.
host.gate.label: Gate code
host.keybox.label: Key box
host.parking.label: Parking
host.map.label: Maps / plan link
host.steps.label: Route steps
host.steps.hint: One step per row, in the order the guest encounters them.
host.video.label: Arrival video (URL, optional)
host.note.label: Global note
host.reveal.label: Code reveal
host.reveal.always.desc: Codes are visible as soon as the booklet opens.
host.reveal.dayBefore16h.desc: Visible the day before at 4 pm, property time.
host.reveal.atCheckin.desc: Visible only from the arrival time.
host.main.help: Codes follow the reveal policy on the guest side. Leave a step empty to hide it.
home.card.title: Access & parking
guest.note.title: Good to know
guest.empty.title: Access not configured
guest.empty.description: Add instructions from the host dashboard
guest.error.title: Access temporarily unavailable
module.status.incomplete.title: Incomplete configuration
module.status.incomplete.description: Finish access setup in the host dashboard
module.status.incomplete.hint: Required fields missing — open Modules → Access & parking
module.status.inactive.title: Access module disabled
module.status.inactive.description: This module is not active on this property
